instruction: Determine which component is affected by this vulnerability.
input: Improper input validation in TrustZone memory transfer interface can lead to information disclosure in Snapdragon Auto, Snapdragon Compute, Snapdragon Connectivity, Snapdragon Consumer IOT, Snapdragon Industrial IOT, Snapdragon Voice & Music, Snapdragon Wired Infrastructure and Networking
output: The affected component is the TrustZone memory transfer interface, integral to the secure processing environment of various Snapdragon products.
